  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Help

    Serialized Form

    • Package common

      • Class common.Message

        class Message extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • action
            ActionType action
            The type of action this message represents.
          • data
            Object data
            Optional data associated with the action.

      • Class common.ServerResponse

        class ServerResponse extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • data
            Object data
            Optional data returned by the server, for example a User object.
          • message
            String message
            A message describing the result of the operation.
          • success
            boolean success
            True if the operation succeeded, false otherwise.

    • Package Entities

      • Class Entities.Bill

        class Bill extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • billID
            int billID
          • issuedAt
            LocalDateTime issuedAt
          • paid
            boolean paid
          • reservationID
            int reservationID
          • totalAmount
            double totalAmount

      • Class Entities.Guest

        class Guest extends User implements Serializable

      • Class Entities.Manager

        class Manager extends User implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • membershipCode
            int membershipCode
          • name
            String name
          • userName
            String userName

      • Class Entities.OpeningHours

        class OpeningHours extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • closingTime
            LocalTime closingTime
            The closing time of the restaurant.
          • openingTime
            LocalTime openingTime
            The opening time of the restaurant.

      • Class Entities.Report

        class Report extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • content
            String content
            Content or description of the report.
          • endDate
            LocalDate endDate
            End date of the reporting period.
          • generatedAt
            LocalDateTime generatedAt
            Timestamp when the report was generated.
          • reportID
            int reportID
            Unique identifier for the report.
          • reportType
            ReportType reportType
            Type of the report.
          • startDate
            LocalDate startDate
            Start date of the reporting period.
          • timeData
            List<TimeData> timeData
            List of time-based data, relevant for time reports.
          • weekData
            List<WeekData> weekData
            List of weekly data, relevant for subscribers reports.

      • Class Entities.Reservation

        class Reservation extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • actualArrivalTime
            LocalTime actualArrivalTime
          • billID
            Integer billID
          • confirmationCode
            int confirmationCode
          • customerID
            Integer customerID
          • expectedDepartureTime
            LocalTime expectedDepartureTime
          • isNotified
            boolean isNotified
          • numOfGuests
            int numOfGuests
          • PaymentReminderSent
            boolean PaymentReminderSent
          • reservationDate
            LocalDate reservationDate
          • reservationID
            int reservationID
          • reservationPlacedDate
            LocalDate reservationPlacedDate
          • reservationPlacedTime
            LocalTime reservationPlacedTime
          • reservationTime
            LocalTime reservationTime
          • status
            ReservationStatus status
          • tableID
            Integer tableID

      • Class Entities.RestaurantSettings

        class RestaurantSettings extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • maxTables
            int maxTables
            Maximum number of tables in the restaurant.
          • reservationDurationHours
            int reservationDurationHours
            Duration of a reservation in hours (default is 2 hours).
          • specialDates
            List<SpecialDates> specialDates
            List of special dates with custom opening and closing hours.
          • weeklyOpeningHours
            List<WeeklyOpeningHours> weeklyOpeningHours
            List of regular weekly opening hours.

      • Class Entities.SpecialDates

        class SpecialDates extends OpeningHours implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • date
            LocalDate date
          • description
            String description

      • Class Entities.Subscriber

        class Subscriber extends User implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • membershipCode
            int membershipCode
          • name
            String name
          • userName
            String userName

      • Class Entities.Supervisor

        class Supervisor extends User implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • membershipCode
            int membershipCode
            Membership code assigned to the supervisor.
          • name
            String name
            Full name of the supervisor.
          • userName
            String userName
            Username used for login or identification.

      • Class Entities.Table

        class Table extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • available
            boolean available
            True if the table is available, false if occupied.
          • capacity
            int capacity
            Number of seats available at the table.
          • tableID
            int tableID
            Unique identifier for the table.

      • Class Entities.TimeData

        class TimeData extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • actualArrivalTime
            LocalTime actualArrivalTime
          • departureTime
            LocalTime departureTime
          • reservationTime
            LocalTime reservationTime

      • Class Entities.User

        class User extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • email
            String email
          • phone
            String phone
          • role
            UserRole role
          • userID
            int userID

      • Class Entities.WaitingList

        class WaitingList extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • waitingList
            List<WaitingListEntry> waitingList
            List of all entries in the waiting list.
          • waitingListDate
            LocalDate waitingListDate
            The date for which this waiting list applies.

      • Class Entities.WaitingListEntry

        class WaitingListEntry extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • confirmationCode
            int confirmationCode
            Confirmation code for this entry.
          • Email
            String Email
            Email of the user or phone as a fallback.
          • exitReason
            ExitReason exitReason
            Reason why the customer left the waiting list.
          • numOfGuests
            int numOfGuests
            Number of guests in this reservation.
          • phone
            String phone
            Phone number of the user or guest.
          • status
            WaitingStatus status
            Current waiting status (WAITING, NOTIFIED, SEATED).
          • userID
            Integer userID
            The user ID, null if the entry belongs to a guest.
          • WaitDate
            LocalDate WaitDate
            Date the user is waiting for.
          • WaitTime
            LocalTime WaitTime
            Time the user is waiting for.

      • Class Entities.WeekData

        class WeekData extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • completed
            int completed
          • waitlist
            int waitlist
          • weekName
            String weekName

      • Class Entities.WeeklyOpeningHours

        class WeeklyOpeningHours extends OpeningHours implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • day
            Day day

    • Package messages

      • Class messages.AddReservationRequest

        class AddReservationRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • reservation
            Reservation reservation

      • Class messages.AddSpecialDateRequest

        class AddSpecialDateRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • specialDate
            SpecialDates specialDate
            The special date to add to the restaurant system.

      • Class messages.AddToWaitingListRequest

        class AddToWaitingListRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • date
            LocalDate date
            The date for which the user is waiting.
          • email
            String email
            The user's email address.
          • numOfGuests
            int numOfGuests
            Number of guests in this request.
          • phone
            String phone
            The user's phone number.
          • time
            LocalTime time
            The time for which the user is waiting.
          • userID
            Integer userID
            The user ID, null if the request is from a guest.

      • Class messages.AddUserRequest

        class AddUserRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • user
            User user

      • Class messages.AvailableDateTimes

        class AvailableDateTimes extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • date
            LocalDate date
          • times
            List<LocalTime> times

      • Class messages.CancelReservationRequest

        class CancelReservationRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • confirmationCode
            Integer confirmationCode
            The confirmation code used by guests to cancel their reservation.
          • guestId
            Integer guestId
            The guest ID associated with the reservation (used for guests).
          • reservationId
            Integer reservationId
            The reservation ID used by subscribers to cancel their reservation.

      • Class messages.CancelWaitingRequest

        class CancelWaitingRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • confirmationCode
            int confirmationCode
            The confirmation code of the waiting list entry to cancel.
          • userId
            Integer userId
            The user ID associated with the entry, null if a guest.

      • Class messages.CreateRegularOpeningHoursRequest

        class CreateRegularOpeningHoursRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • hours
            WeeklyOpeningHours hours

      • Class messages.DeleteOpeningHoursRequest

        class DeleteOpeningHoursRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • day
            Day day

      • Class messages.DeleteSpecialDateRequest

        class DeleteSpecialDateRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • date
            LocalDate date
            The specific date to be deleted from the restaurant system.

      • Class messages.DeleteTableRequest

        class DeleteTableRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • tableId
            int tableId
            The unique identifier (ID) of the table to delete.

      • Class messages.ForgotCodeRequest

        class ForgotCodeRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • userId
            Integer userId
            The unique identifier (ID) of the user who requested the code recovery.

      • Class messages.GetAllReservationsRequest

        class GetAllReservationsRequest extends Object implements Serializable

      • Class messages.GetAllUsersRequest

        class GetAllUsersRequest extends Object implements Serializable

      • Class messages.GetAvailableTimesRequest

        class GetAvailableTimesRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • date
            LocalDate date
            The specific date to check for available time slots.
          • forWaitingList
            boolean forWaitingList
            Indicates whether the availability check is for the waiting list.
          • guests
            int guests
            The number of guests for the reservation.

      • Class messages.GetNearestAvailableTimesRequest

        class GetNearestAvailableTimesRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • date
            LocalDate date
            The desired date for the reservation.
          • guests
            int guests
            The number of guests for the reservation.

      • Class messages.GetRestaurantSettingsRequest

        class GetRestaurantSettingsRequest extends Object implements Serializable

      • Class messages.GetUserInformationRequest

        class GetUserInformationRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • userID
            int userID
            The unique identifier (ID) of the user whose information is being requested.

      • Class messages.GetUserReservationsRequest

        class GetUserReservationsRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • customerId
            int customerId
            The unique identifier (ID) of the customer whose reservations are being requested.

      • Class messages.GetWaitingListBetweenDatesRequest

        class GetWaitingListBetweenDatesRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • endDate
            LocalDate endDate
            The end date of the range for the waiting list retrieval.
          • startDate
            LocalDate startDate
            The start date of the range for the waiting list retrieval.

      • Class messages.InsertTableRequest

        class InsertTableRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • seats
            int seats
            The maximum number of seats (capacity) for the new table.
          • tableId
            int tableId
            The unique identifier (ID) to be assigned to the new table.

      • Class messages.LoginRequest

        class LoginRequest extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • membershipCode
            int membershipCode
            The secret or unique membership code used to verify the user's authenticity.
          • userID
            int userID
            The unique identifier (ID) of the user attempting to log in.

      • Class messages.LogoutRequest

        class LogoutRequest extends Object implements Serializable

      • Class messages.PaymentRequest

        class PaymentRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • confirmationCode
            int confirmationCode
            The unique confirmation code associated with the reservation being paid for.
          • depatureTime
            LocalTime depatureTime
            The time the customer departed from the restaurant.

      • Class messages.RegisterRequest

        class RegisterRequest extends Object implements Serializable
        serialVersionUID:
        1L

        • Serialized Fields

          • email
            String email
            The email address of the user.
          • membershipCode
            int membershipCode
            The specific membership or subscription code.
          • name
            String name
            The full name of the user.
          • phone
            String phone
            The phone number of the user.
          • role
            UserRole role
            The defined role of the user within the system (e.g., ADMIN, CLIENT).
          • userID
            int userID
            The unique identifier for the user.
          • username
            String username
            The login username chosen by the user.

      • Class messages.ReportRequest

        class ReportRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • month
            int month
            The specific month for the report (1-12).
          • reportType
            ReportType reportType
            The type of report to be generated (e.g., Revenue, Cancellations, Activity).
          • year
            int year
            The specific year for the report.

      • Class messages.SeatCustomerRequest

        class SeatCustomerRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • actualArrivalTime
            LocalTime actualArrivalTime
            The actual time the customer arrived at the restaurant.
          • confirmationCode
            int confirmationCode
            The unique confirmation code associated with the customer's reservation.
          • userId
            int userId
            The unique identifier (ID) of the user/customer to be seated.

      • Class messages.updateRegularClosingTimeRequest

        class updateRegularClosingTimeRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • closingTime
            LocalTime closingTime
            The new standard closing time to be applied.
          • day
            Day day
            The day of the week for which the closing time is being updated.

      • Class messages.updateRegularOpeningTimeRequest

        class updateRegularOpeningTimeRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • day
            Day day
            The day of the week for which the opening time is being updated.
          • openingTime
            LocalTime openingTime
            The new standard opening time to be applied for the specified day.

      • Class messages.UpdateReservationRequest

        class UpdateReservationRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • numOfGuests
            int numOfGuests
            The updated number of guests for the reservation.
          • reservationDate
            LocalDate reservationDate
            The updated date for the reservation.
          • reservationID
            int reservationID
            The unique identifier of the reservation to be updated.
          • reservationTime
            LocalTime reservationTime
            The updated time for the reservation.
          • status
            ReservationStatus status
            The updated status of the reservation (e.g., Confirmed, Cancelled).

      • Class messages.UpdateSpecialDateRequest

        class UpdateSpecialDateRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • closingTime
            LocalTime closingTime
            The new closing time for the restaurant on this special date.
          • date
            LocalDate date
            The new date to be set for this special date record.
          • description
            String description
            The new description for the special date.
          • oldDate
            LocalDate oldDate
            The original date of the record that needs to be updated.
          • openingTime
            LocalTime openingTime
            The new opening time for the restaurant on this special date.

      • Class messages.UpdateTableRequest

        class UpdateTableRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • seats
            int seats
            The new number of seats to be assigned to the table.
          • tableId
            int tableId
            The unique identifier (ID) of the table to be updated.

      • Class messages.UpdateUserRequest

        class UpdateUserRequest extends Object implements Serializable

        • Serialized Fields

          • user
            User user
            The User entity containing updated information.
